to reconstitute the committee.

Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,

Date: 6th March, 2026
Reference: -
(1) Government Decision Department of Higher and Technical Education No. Narrow-2020 / (Q. 78/20) / Aastha-2,
(2) Government Decision Department of Higher and Technical Education No. Narrow - 2025 / E.P. No.946792 / Mashi-2,
The Proposal: -
Reference No. 1 Publication of Lokmanya Tilak Charitra Sadhana by Government Decision here
A committee has been formed. Reference No. 2 This Committee shall be governed by the decision of the Government hereunder.
Three months from the date of expiry or the committee will be reconstituted whichever is earlier.
The deadline was extended for as long as possible. Accordingly, the committee was reconstituted.
The matter was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Lokmanya Tilak Charitra Sadhana Prakashan Samiti as shown in the following statement:
The government is approving the restructuring.

Member of the Council of Ministers

para_trans: The term of the said Committee shall be for a period of 03 years.
3. Government Decision No. Procedure of the Committee as prescribed under section 1.
And the terms and conditions will remain the same.
4. This Government Decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
